scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @pagestate/ir && npm run test --workspace @pagestate/ir && npm run build --workspace @pagestate/templates && npm run test --workspace @pagestate/templates && npm run test --workspace @pagestate/commands && npm run build --workspace @pagestate/project && npm run test --workspace @pagestate/project && npm run test --workspace @pagestate/renderer-reveal
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @pagestate/ir && npm run build --workspace @pagestate/templates && npm run build --workspace @pagestate/commands && npm run build --workspace @pagestate/project && npm run build --workspace @pagestate/renderer-reveal
scripts.build:schema: npm run build:schema --workspace @pagestate/ir && npm run build:schema --workspace @pagestate/commands && npm run build:schema --workspace @pagestate/templates
scripts.render:templates: npm run demo:write --workspace @pagestate/templates && npm run render:deck --workspace @pagestate/renderer-reveal -- packages/templates/examples/template-demo-deck.json exports/template-demo
